title: Migrate can move containers to a user-defined runtime
body:
Allow resetting container runtime on migrate. Probably voids your warranty. Don't use unless you really need to.

(Really need to is F30 -> F31 upgrades, right now)

comments.body:

Per discussion with @baude made this more generic and not F31 specific. Safe to merge now.
/hold cancel.
@mheon, since this is more generic, does the "F31 ONLY" note in the description still hold?

Oops. Excellent point.

On Thu, Oct 10, 2019, 03:43 Giuseppe Scrivano <notifications@github.com>
wrote:

> *@giuseppe* commented on this pull request.
> ------------------------------
>
> In libpod/runtime_migrate.go
> <https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4221#discussion_r333371697>:
>
> >  		oldLocation := filepath.Join(ctr.state.RunDir, "conmon.pid")
>  		if ctr.config.ConmonPidFile == oldLocation {
>  			logrus.Infof("changing conmon PID file for %s", ctr.ID())
>  			ctr.config.ConmonPidFile = filepath.Join(ctr.config.StaticDir, "conmon.pid")
> +			needsWrite = true
> +		}
> +
> +		// Reset runtime
> +		if runtimeChangeRequested {
> +			logrus.Infof("Resetting container %s runtime to crun", ctr.ID())
>
> should the hardcoded crun be changed to requestedRuntime?
